name: King Global Ventures Inc.
summary: King Global Ventures Inc., a junior prospecting and natural-resource company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties. It holds a 100% interest in Marilyn Three Properties that include 104 claim blocks of approximately 6,448 acres located near Grand Falls, Newfoundland; and York Gold project consisting of 77 claims situated in northeastern Quebec. King Global Ventures Inc. also holds interests in three gold exploration properties, including the Gold Boulder property, the Golden Nugget property, and the Miss Pickle property in the province of Newfoundland and Labrador. The company was formerly known as Rosita Mining Corporation and changed its name to King Global Ventures Inc. in September 2019. King Global Ventures Inc. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
